scope_declaration.files_to_modify: rule_watcher/__init__.py, rule_watcher/config.py, rule_watcher/db.py, pyproject.toml, rule_watcher/providers/__init__.py, rule_watcher/providers/base.py, rule_watcher/providers/mock_provider.py, rule_watcher/providers/data_service.py, rule_watcher/providers/kis_provider.py, tests/test_kis_provider.py, rule_watcher/indicators/__init__.py, rule_watcher/indicators/trend.py, rule_watcher/indicators/momentum.py, rule_watcher/indicators/volatility.py, rule_watcher/indicators/volume.py, rule_watcher/indicators/price.py, tests/test_indicators.py, rule_watcher/engine/__init__.py, rule_watcher/engine/rule_model.py, rule_watcher/engine/rulebook_engine.py, rule_watcher/engine/screening_engine.py, tests/test_rulebook_engine.py, rule_watcher/alert/__init__.py, rule_watcher/alert/notifiers.py, rule_watcher/alert/alert_engine.py, tests/test_alert_engine.py, rule_watcher/ui/__init__.py, rule_watcher/ui/app.py, rule_watcher/ui/watchlist_tab.py, rule_watcher/ui/rulebook_tab.py, rule_watcher/ui/results_tab.py, rule_watcher/ui/alert_tab.py, rule_watcher/ui/scheduler.py, main.py, README.md, sample_rulebooks/oversold_rebound.json, sample_rulebooks/trend_breakout.json, sample_rulebooks/volume_surge.json, tests/test_integration.py, tests/e2e/test_rule_watcher_e2e.py

module_summary.mt: 프로젝트 스캐폴딩 (rule_watcher 패키지, config, db, pyproject.toml)
Data Provider 계층 (BaseProvider ABC, MockProvider, DataService 싱글톤)
KISProvider v1 stub (mock fallback, 15/sec throttle 준비)

test_summary.oracle_tc4: PASS -- API 키 없이 mock provider 실행

impact_analysis.target_function: project_scaffold, create_db_schema, init_config_loader, BaseProvider.get_ohlcv, MockProvider.*, DataService.get_provider, KISProvider.*, calc_sma, calc_ema, calc_macd, calc_adx, calc_rsi, calc_stochastic, calc_stoch_rsi, calc_cci, calc_roc, calc_bollinger, calc_atr, calc_donchian, calc_volume_ma, calc_obv, calc_mfi, calc_vwap, calc_prev_high_breakout, calc_near_high, calc_ma_cross, calc_gap, calc_price_condition, RuleCondition.evaluate, RuleGroup.evaluate, RuleBook.evaluate_all, ScreeningEngine.screen_ticker, AlertEngine.trigger, AlertEngine.check_cooldown, InAppNotifier.notify, SoundNotifier.notify, NotifierRegistry.register, WatchlistTab.render, RulebookTab.render, ResultsTab.render, AlertTab.render, AppScheduler.start, write_readme, write_sample_rulebooks, integration_test_runner
impact_analysis.side_effects: 신규 SQLite DB 파일 생성 (첫 실행 시), .env 파일 읽기 (선택적), Streamlit 웹 서버 기동 (main.py 실행 시)

handover.notes: 전체 8개 모듈 PASS, 통합 게이트 PASS, 81개 테스트 통과. QA 단계 진행 준비 완료.
